original_image_tags: A single page of aged, off-white paper with two punched holes at the top center. The page is oriented upside-down relative to the viewer. The top half (as displayed) contains faint, mirrored text from the reverse side of the paper (show-through). The bottom half contains several blue ink stamps and a handwritten annotation in the lower-left corner.

elements.description: Aged paper page with multiple faded rubber stamps at the bottom. Stamps include 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION Aug 18 11:44 AM '47', 'MR. JONES', 'FBI RECEIVED Jul 30 9:47 AM '47', 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.', and 'FBI RECEIVED'. Faint reversed text from the reverse side is visible through the paper. A small handwritten annotation is visible on the left edge. The main body consists of faint, largely illegible reversed typed text.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text for multiple stamps (e.g., 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION Aug 18 11:44 AM '47', 'MR. JONES', 'FBI RECEIVED Jul 30 9:47 AM '47', 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.', 'FBI RECEIVED'), while Description A states the stamps are 'several blue ink stamps' with no specific quoted text and claims the page is oriented upside-down, contradicting the stamp legibility and orientation implied by Description B.
